title: PosFound Function
description:
PosFound Function

PosFound Function

See_Also Example

Returns status of Find operation.
see_also:
Find

PosFound Function Example

Find Sw(5) = ON

		Go P10 Find

		If PosFound Then

		  Go FindPos

		Else

		  Print "Error: Cannot find the sensor signal."

		EndIf
examples:
Find Sw(5) = ON
		Go P10 Find
		If PosFound Then
		  Go FindPos
		Else
